name: adsha-goods-porter
description: Porter-like platform with mobile apps and web admin

scripts.install-all: npm run install-backend && npm run install-admin && npm run install-mobile-apps
scripts.install-mobile-apps: cd mobile-driver && npm install && cd ../mobile-customer && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start-backend" "npm run start-admin" "npm run start-mobile-driver" "npm run start-mobile-customer"
scripts.test: npm run test-backend && npm run test-admin && npm run test-mobile
scripts.test-mobile: cd mobile-driver && npm test && cd ../mobile-customer && npm test
scripts.build: npm run build-backend && npm run build-admin && npm run build-mobile
scripts.build-mobile: cd mobile-driver && npm run build && cd ../mobile-customer && npm run build

author: Adsha Goods Team
